name: @flying-pillow/mission-workspace
description: Mission workspace and filesystem manager for the full monorepo.

scripts.airport: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission && node packages/mission/build/mission.js
scripts.airport:hmr: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission && node packages/mission/build/mission.js --hmr
scripts.airport:status: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission && node packages/mission/build/mission.js airport:status
scripts.ci:verify: pnpm check && pnpm build && pnpm test:all
scripts.mission: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission && node packages/mission/build/mission.js
scripts.missiond: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission && node packages/mission/build/missiond.js
scripts.test:daemon-mission: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission-airport-terminal && pnpm exec tsx apps/airport/terminal/src/scripts/daemonMissionSmokeTest.ts
scripts.test:workflow-e2e: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@flying-pillow/mission-airport-terminal && pnpm exec tsx apps/airport/terminal/src/scripts/daemonCurrentWorkflowE2eTest.ts
